516EC95F.problem_statement:
Healthcare providers spend excessive time on manual documentation, reducing patient engagement.
Inefficient coding and claim preparation lead to revenue leakage and delayed reimbursements.
Lack of automation in front-office operations results in administrative overhead and human errors.
Need for real-time, accurate, and compliant documentation from patient–doctor conversations.
516EC95F.project_description: Multi-agent AI system that converts clinical conversations into compliant, review-ready notes, codes, summaries, and RCM workflows.
